mapper.select:
SELECT q.*, ( (IFNULL(q.view_count,0)*0.3 + IFNULL(q.answer_count,0)*1 + IFNULL(q.vote_count,0)*2 + IFNULL(q.favorite_count,0)*1.5) * GREATEST(0.1, POW(0.85, GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, q.created_at, NOW()) - 24) / 24.0)) * CASE WHEN q.is_featured = 1 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.0 END ) AS _score FROM t_question q
INNER JOIN t_question_tag qt ON q.id = qt.question_id AND qt.tag_id = #{query.tagId}
WHERE q.status = 'published'
AND q.category_id = #{query.categoryId}
ORDER BY q.answer_count DESC, q.view_count DESC, q.created_at DESC
ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
ORDER BY q.is_pinned DESC, _score DESC, q.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_question SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
